description: Keyhaven capability set. Grants no general networking to the webview (no http plugin); the only outbound traffic is the updater plugin checking GitHub Releases for new versions and downloading a signed update. Filesystem access is dialog-scoped: paths come from the native open/save dialog, and only file read/write/exists/rename are permitted. Clipboard is limited to text read/write/clear for the copy-with-auto-clear feature. Process restart is permitted so the app can relaunch after applying an update.
